reviews.comment:
Muy linda estación, todo impecable, los empleados son muy amables, los sanitarios impecables, pero si te agarra el cambio de turno, todo se para por casi media hora y después el sistema informático puede arrancar nuevamente o no
Igualmente, aunque tuve esa experiencia, volvería a parar, está muy bien instalada

(Translated by Google)
Very nice station, everything is spotless, the employees are very friendly, the restrooms are immaculate, but if you're there during a shift change, everything shuts down for almost half an hour and then the computer system may or may not restart. Even so, despite that experience, I would stop there again; it's very well set up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJa2RLSlRnEAE
